title: Policy: Policy Applied - Settings Locked
scenario: Lens Cloud policy applied settings are locked and greyed out in Poly Studio Mobile app with dialog notification
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Ensure a Lens Cloud policy is applied to the device that affects one or more settings (e.g., ANC, Transparency Mode, Equalizer).
3. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Audio Settings.
4. Observe the affected settings — they should be greyed out/locked and display the values from the applied policy.
6. Observe the dialog that appears informing the user that the setting is locked.
7. Create a new Lens Cloud policy that affects the same settings but with different values.
8. Return to the Poly Studio Mobile app and navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Audio Settings again.
9. Observe that the affected settings remain locked/greyed out, but now display the new values from the updated policy.
10. Create a Lens Cloud policy that affects all available settings in the app (e.g., ANC, Transparency Mode, Equalizer, Notifications).
11. Return to the Poly Studio Mobile app and navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Audio Settings.
12. Observe that all settings are locked/greyed out and display the values from the policy.
expected: All settings affected by the Lens Cloud policy are locked/greyed out and display the policy's values. Tapping a locked setting shows a dialog informing the user the setting is locked. When a new policy is applied, the locked settings update to the new values while remaining locked. When a policy affects all available settings, all settings are locked with the policy values.
